name: Italian Anise Biscuit (Biscotti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast 1 cup whole almonds in an oven set to 350°F for 15 minutes.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs and sugar until well combined. Add butter and mix until smooth.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the egg mixture. Mix thoroughly.
5. Stir in the anise oil.
6. Shape the dough into two loaves on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
8. Cut each loaf into slices and arrange them cut-side down on a new baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Bake for an additional 5 to 6 minutes, turning the slices halfway through, until lightly browned on both sides.
10. Allow the biscuits to cool completely before removing from the baking sheets.
